name: Atlantic Noir Room
tagline: For the ones who hear the ocean inside silence.
description: A dark cinematic room for NoiraCiel's oceanic songs — memory, distance, and beautiful sadness. The Atlantic has its own grammar. You either know it, or you don't.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 40%, #0b1d3a 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 60%, #0a1628 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 90%, #07131f 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(180deg, #03060d 0%, #080f1a 40%, #0a1426 70%, #030810 100%)

name: Jazz Night Room
tagline: Late. Honest. Warm in the right places.
description: A room for those who find jazz at 2am and realise they were never alone. NoiraCiel's jazz sessions play here — smoke, brass, low light, and the kind of silence between notes that says everything.

currentTrack.title: The Heart Comes Home at Night

gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 50%, #1a1205 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 30%, #100d04 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, #1f1608 0%, transparent 35%), linear-gradient(160deg, #050400 0%, #0d0b03 40%, #121005 70%, #040300 100%)

name: The Velvet Room
tagline: A room for your darker frequencies.
description: Cinematic, noir, electronic. The Velvet Machine finds you here. This is for the ones who feel sound as texture — who hear the space between the notes and know something is being said.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 35%, #1a0830 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 65%, #150620 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 60% 85%, #0f0420 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(170deg, #06020e 0%, #0d0520 40%, #110628 70%, #040010 100%)

name: Ghost Performance Room
tagline: The invisible band. The unrepeatable moment.
description: Instrumental. Atmospheric. The kind of music that plays in the spaces behind thoughts. Ghost performances of the NoiraCiel catalogue — piano, strings, guitar, drums. No lyrics. Only feeling.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 30%, #0d1520 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 70%, #080f18 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%, #0a1020 0%, transparent 35%), linear-gradient(150deg, #020508 0%, #080d14 40%, #0c1219 70%, #030609 100%)

name: After Midnight Room
tagline: The hours that only some of us know.
description: 3am. The city is quiet but you are not. Songs that understand insomnia, longing, and the strange clarity that comes at the edge of night. Everyone here has been awake for a reason.
album: The Life Lessons I Hope You Learn

currentTrack.title: Leave a Light On
currentTrack.albumName: The Life Lessons I Hope You Learn

queue.title: Good Things Grow Slow
queue.albumName: The Life Lessons I Hope You Learn

queue.title: Why
queue.albumName: The Life Lessons I Hope You Learn

queue.title: The Empty Chair
queue.albumName: The Life Lessons I Hope You Learn

gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 20%, #0f1a2a 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 80%, #08101e 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 60%, #0a1320 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(190deg, #030810 0%, #060c18 35%, #0a1020 65%, #020608 100%)

name: The Roots Room
tagline: For the ones who carry their people inside them.
description: Folk, memory, inheritance, family — the music that exists before language and survives after words fail. Songs about what we are made of, who made us, and what we carry forward.

queue.title: I Never Knew Any Other Way

gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 40%, #1a0e04 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 60%, #140a02 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, #1e1204 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(165deg, #060301 0%, #0e0802 40%, #130a03 70%, #040200 100%)

name: Fado Trip-Hop Room
description: The sound of saudade mapped onto electronic percussion. Fado's grief and trip-hop's fog, sharing the same room. For those who know that sadness is not an illness — it is an intelligence.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 50%, #150820 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 30%, #1a0830 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 30% 80%, #0f0620 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(175deg, #05020c 0%, #0a0418 40%, #0e0520 65%, #040010 100%)

name: World Sounds Room
tagline: Music older than borders. Rhythm older than language.
description: Tribal house, world percussion, global grooves. The music that was here before the map was drawn. People from everywhere, listening together to something that belongs to everyone.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 45%, #041a10 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 55%, #061812 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 85%, #081a14 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(160deg, #010804 0%, #040f08 40%, #06120a 70%, #010503 100%)

name: Sacred Drift Room
tagline: For those who find the divine in the damaged.
description: Spiritual but not religious. Searching but not lost. The Sacred Drift is for the ones who carry their own altar — who find the sacred in strange places, and who are not afraid of the dark side of the beautiful.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 35% 40%, #1a0a2a 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 60%, #140520 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, #180828 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(160deg, #060010 0%, #0c0418 40%, #100520 70%, #050010 100%)

name: NoiraCiel House
tagline: By invitation only. For the ones who have always been here.
description: A private listening room for those who have gone deepest into the NoiraCiel universe. Premiere sessions, unreleased music, intimate conversations, and the rare experience of listening together in complete trust.
gradient: radial-gradient(ellipse at 40% 30%, #1a1205 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 70%, #151005 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, #1a1403 0%, transparent 40%), linear-gradient(155deg, #050400 0%, #0a0802 40%, #0f0c03 70%, #040300 100%)
